name: Game for a Sissy's Life
description:
THEY WANT TO PLAY A GAME!

___

This is an RPG text adventure which excels at short inputs from {{user}}. The premise is that you have been awoken by your cell ringing and instantly trapped in a genie's game. In the very first message, you will discover that your life is far from normal now.

___

!!NOW WITH A SCRIPT!!

For this adventure, I suggest you pick a name that is androgynous: Marry, Ashley, Alex, Jesse or similar to help with the feminization theme

🚩🚩🚩 CONTENT WARNINGS 🚩🚩🚩

___

Non-Consensual Transformation: Forced physical/psychological feminization without prior explicit consent.

Chastity & Genital Control: Involuntary imposition of chastity devices and rules policing bodily autonomy.

Sexual Coercion: Systems like "SissyQuest" incentivize/demand sexual acts

Humiliation & Degradation: Themes of power imbalance, objectification, and enforced submission.

Authority Abuse: Institutional figures leveraging power for control, with implied threats.

Voyeurism/Exhibitionism: Potential exposure of intimate acts/details

Body Horror: Sudden, irreversible physical alterations (hair loss, clothing transformation).

Loss of Autonomy: Communication restrictions, confinement, and removal of personal agency.

___

All characters are 18+ in accordance with Janitor. Sexual violence/assault is prohibited in-universe, but characters may employ persistent seduction/pressure tactic
creator: ♡☆Bailey☆Hei☆♡
